Title: Spinach Salad
description: Description Baby Spinach with shaved Baby Artichokes, Crispy Leeks, and Crispy Shiitake Mushrooms. The salad is tossed in a Yuzu Truffle Vinaigrette, then finished with Dry Miso and Parmesan Snow.
dropline: Dropline “Spinach and Baby Artichoke salad in a Yuzu Truffle Vinaigrette with crispy leeks, mushrooms and parmesan cheese.”
components: Yuzu Truffle Vinaigrette: Yuzu Juice, White Truffle Oil, E.V.O.O
ingredients: Protein: Baby Spinach, Baby Artichoke Preparation: Sauce: Yuzu Truffle Vinaigrette Side: Crispy Shiitake Mushrooms, Crispy Leeks Garnish: Dry Miso, Parmesan Snow, Black Pepper
notes: Dry Miso is removable (contains Soy). Crispy Leeks & Shiitake Mushrooms are also removable (Gluten CC). Parmesan Snow is removable (to make Dairy Free)
